title: Antonio Garcia Martinez
html:
Antonio García Martínez (AGM) — author of Chaos Monkeys and the "How to Run a Startup" essay. Yahir distilled AGM's principles into the July 2023 startup advice note — most concentrated startup-philosophy doc in the corpus prior to Rankett.

What we know

  • AGM's two-trait founder filter (per Yahir's note): "ability to monomaniacally and obsessively focus on one thing... at the expense of everything else in life" + "ability to take and endure endless amounts of shit."
  • Famous AGM lines Yahir quotes: "Marketing is like sex — only losers pay for it." + "Have a leader: ONE captain making the calls."
  • Influence on Yahir's operating style: the "firewall the rest of the company from the mess" containment principle, the "before meeting someone, know every goddamn thing about the person" prep discipline, the "phone calls are the way to prove if something is juicy" secrecy heuristic.
  • Position in Yahir's mentor-from-afar pantheon: alongside Masayoshi Son, Paul Graham, Mark Cuban, Chamath Palihapitiya, Jensen Huang.
